leadText: Muddy Water (Japanese: だくりゅう Muddy Stream) is a damage-dealing Water-type move introduced in Generation III. Prior to Generation IV, it was the signature move of Marshtomp and Swampert. It is: TR45 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM209 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM140 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Muddy Water inflicts damage and has a 30% chance of lowering each target's accuracy by one stage. Muddy Water targets all adjacent opponents. Generation III to V [ edit | edit source ] Muddy Water's power is 95. Muddy Water can be used as the second move of a Pokémon Contest combination , with the user gaining 2 bonus appeal points if Rain Dance was used in the previous turn. Generation VI onwards [ edit | edit source ] Muddy Water's power was lowered to 90. Muddy Water will also destroy stalagmites found in the background of battles .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E Colo XD Attacks with muddy water. May lower accuracy. FR LG The user attacks with muddy water. It may also lower the foe's accuracy. D P Pt HG SS PBR The user attacks by shooting out muddy water. It may also lower the foe's accuracy. B W B2 W2 The user attacks by shooting muddy water at the opposing team. It may also lower the targets' accuracy. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E The user attacks by shooting muddy water at the opposing Pokémon. This may also lower their accuracy. Sw Sh BD SP LA S V The user attacks by shooting muddy water at opposing Pokémon. This may also lower their accuracy. ZA The user attacks by shooting muddy water at targets. This also makes targets move more slowly for a short time.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Inflicts damage on the target. It may also lower the target's Accuracy by one level. MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target. It may also reduce the target's accuracy by 1 level. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる しかも いっていのかくりつで めいちゅうを １だんかいさげる MD GtI It damages all Pokémon in the same room except you. It could also lower their accuracy. S MD It damages all Pokémon in the same room as you except for you. It could also lower their accuracy.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Surf and Muddy Water have had similar in-game animations since the latter's introduction, with the only difference being the color. This move originated as a TCG attack .
